generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from the hoist"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylib, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement along the crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up and releases containers"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for Database, MQTT Broker, and Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto, Grafana
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time state signal transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization and dashboard tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and data processing logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane geometry"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE tool for Arcadia modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArcadiaModel
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane and motor controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for Model-Based Systems Engineering representation in Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates trajectories using simulation model"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs and triggers alerts on threshold exceedance"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAlertInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs time-series data to TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccessInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes trajectory traces and simulation confidence bounds via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path for crane movement derived from kinematic models"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results validating trajectory feasibility"
]

instance DeviationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when measurement-simulation deviations exceed thresholds"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical data for analysis and trend detection"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of trajectory traces with confidence bounds"
]

instance ProactiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proactive maintenance triggered by deviation alerts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting crane trajectory based on validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Trajectory Generator Service and Human Machine Interface are sent through the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to control cart and hoist motors via TMC4671-Eval controllers, and to operate the electromagnet via the Arduino."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with the Continuous Validation Service performing ongoing comparison of executed trajectories against simulations, and the Logging Application recording state data at high frequency for time-series analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based architecture with physical components (crane, controllers, sensors) interacting with digital services via MQTT and TimescaleDB. The Physical Crane Interface bridges physical and digital layers, while the MQTT Broker enables service-to-service communication for trajectory generation, simulation, and validation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with the digital twin continuously monitoring and validating crane performance during real-time operation for fault detection, trajectory optimization, and continuous validation, as evidenced by publications on operational fault localization and continuous validation methods."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time trajectory measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds. Model validation techniques from [5] are reused to ensure simulation fidelity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time signaling between services. TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) for persistent data storage of time-series sensor and control data."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) containerized via Docker with a single docker-compose file. Physical and digital services run on a single personal computer, with gantrylib Python module installed via pip for system control."
]
